scripts.setup:
# bundle, create db, migrate, run seeds
bin/setup
scripts.run:
# Kill whatever is running on port 3000
lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9
bin/dev
scripts.archive:
# Frontend deps
rm -rf node_modules

# Vite build output
rm -rf public/vite public/vite-ssr public/vite-dev

# Rails tmp + logs
rm -rf tmp/cache tmp/pids tmp/sockets tmp/storage
rm -f log/*.log
